Friday Harbor周五港
№ 005 Wednesday, April 29, 2026 2026年4月29日星期三 Seattle, WA · 47.6° N, 122.3° W 西雅图 · 北纬 47.6°，西经 122.3°

When the Model Draws Seattle 当模型来画西雅图

Asked one neighborhood at a time, Claude returned all 90. Every one is an axis-aligned rectangle, median 615 m off, worst case 6.9 km. The map of the model's knowledge is also a map of who has written about Seattle. 每次只问一个街区，Claude 给了全部 90 个回答；每一个都是与经纬度对齐的矩形，中位偏移 615 米，最差一例 6.9 公里。模型知识的地图，也是「谁写过西雅图」的地图。

The notebook札记

The exercise is small. Take the City of Seattle's official list of 90 named neighborhoods. Prompt Claude (Opus 4.7) ninety times — once per neighborhood, formatted as "[name] neighborhood, Seattle". For each prompt, ask for a single GeoJSON polygon: the model's best recall of where that neighborhood sits. No external lookups. Render what comes back at the same scale and projection as the city's data, with the city's actual silhouette underneath as a baseline.

The answer is on the right. Claude returned ninety polygons — one for each prompt. Every single one is a rectangle whose sides are aligned to lines of latitude and longitude, and whose corners are coordinates rounded to three decimal places. The model did not draw a city; it drew a checklist with bounding boxes attached. Lake Washington, Puget Sound, Lake Union, the Ship Canal, the Duwamish, I-5, the diagonal of East Madison — none of these enter the geometry, because the model does not have geometry. It has centroids it can recite, with arbitrary rectangular skirts thrown over them.

The error is unevenly distributed. Pike Place lands within 71 m of its true location — it is a famous landmark with strong text presence. Portage Bay, Interbay, Gatewood, Green Lake all land inside 200 m. The misses are striking and patterned. Genesee — a small Rainier Valley neighborhood with little online presence — lands 6.9 km away. South Beacon Hill is 3.6 km off. Windermere, Mid-Beacon Hill, Rainier Beach: all over a kilometre out of place. Median drift across all 90 is 615 m. Mean is 805 m, dragged up by the long tail of neighborhoods that Claude has read about only barely.

What this exposes is not stupidity. It is the shape of the model's knowledge. The model has read about Seattle from the parts of the internet that talk about Seattle most: real-estate listings, restaurant reviews, news about Capitol Hill, the U District, Ballard, Fremont, tourist material about Pike Place. It has read less about Genesee, Atlantic, Holly Park, Riverview, Roxhill, Olympic Hills. The further a neighborhood sits from the centre of English-language internet attention, the further the model's rectangle drifts from where it actually is.

This is therefore a small anti-map of the kind the Friday Harbor project argues for. It does not show the city. It shows the shape of attention that produced the model — and a city that would be unrecognisable to anyone who lives south of I-90.

这一页做的事情很简单：拿西雅图市政府公布的 90 个标准命名街区，每个街区作为一个独立提问，按 "[name] neighborhood, Seattle" 的格式问 Claude（Opus 4.7）一次，请它返回该街区的 GeoJSON 多边形。 不允许查阅任何外部资料。把 90 个回答放回同一张图，用同一个投影、同一个比例尺，把市政府的真实西雅图轮廓垫在底下作为参照。

右图就是答案。Claude 返回了 90 个多边形——每个提问对应一个。每一个，都是一组与经纬线对齐的矩形，所有顶点都是保留三位小数的取整坐标。这不是一座城市的地图，这是一份「清单 + 外接矩形」。 华盛顿湖、普吉特海湾、联合湖、船运河、Duwamish 河、I-5 高速、E Madison 的斜街—— 全都不进入这套几何，因为模型没有几何。它只有一些可以背诵出来的中心点坐标，外加任意尺寸的矩形外套。

错误的分布并不均匀。Pike Place（派克市场）的偏差只有 71 米——它是知名地标，文本曝光极高。 Portage Bay、Interbay、Gatewood、Green Lake 也都在 200 米以内。但偏离最大的几例非常有特征： Genesee——一个 Rainier Valley 内的小街区，互联网上几乎没人写过它——偏离了 6.9 公里；South Beacon Hill 偏 3.6 公里； Windermere、Mid-Beacon Hill、Rainier Beach——都超过 1 公里。全部 90 个的中位偏移是 615 米， 均值 805 米，被那条「长尾上模型几乎没读过」的街区拉高。

这暴露的不是模型的「笨」。它暴露的是这个模型的知识本身的形状—— 它从互联网上谈论西雅图最多的那些角落读到了西雅图：房产挂牌、餐评、关于 Capitol Hill / U District / Ballard / Fremont 的新闻、关于 Pike Place 的旅游材料。 它没怎么读到过 Genesee、Atlantic、Holly Park、Riverview、Roxhill、Olympic Hills。 一个街区离「英文互联网注意力中心」越远，模型给它的矩形也就离它本来的位置越远。

所以这是 Friday Harbor 这条脉络所主张的那种「反图」（anti-map）——它呈现的不是城市， 而是生产这个模型的那份注意力的形状。对一个住在 I-90 以南的人来说， 右图里的西雅图是认不出来的。

The provenance出处

  • Real boundaries: City of Seattle Neighborhood Map Atlas via the seattleio/seattle-boundaries-data repository, filtered to city == "Seattle"; coordinates rounded to 4 decimal places (~11 m precision).
  • AI boundaries: prompt issued to Claude Opus 4.7 within this writing session, asking for GeoJSON polygons of named Seattle neighborhoods with no external lookups. The returned polygons are stored verbatim — not reshaped, not cleaned. The model's output is the data.
  • Both layers projected with d3-geo's Albers projection, parallels at 47.5° and 47.75°, centred on Seattle.
  • Centroid drift figure computed locally as the median Haversine distance between the centroid of each Claude polygon and the centroid of the same-named real polygon (35 pairs).
  • Source map & build script: src/pages/friday-harbor/2026-04-29-when-the-model-draws-seattle.astro; data files in public/data/seattle-neighborhoods-real.geojson and seattle-neighborhoods-claude.geojson.
  • 真实边界：西雅图市《Neighborhood Map Atlas》，经 seattleio/seattle-boundaries-data 仓库加载，筛选 city == "Seattle"；坐标保留 4 位小数（约 11 m 精度）。
  • AI 边界：在本次写作会话中，向 Claude Opus 4.7 发出请求，要求返回西雅图街区的 GeoJSON 多边形，禁止查阅外部资料。返回的多边形原样保存——未做任何整形、对齐或清洗。模型输出本身就是数据。
  • 两层数据均用 d3-geo 的 Albers 投影渲染，标准纬线 47.5°、47.75°，中心点设在西雅图。
  • 质心偏移：本地计算，每对同名街区（共 35 对）的多边形质心间的 Haversine 距离，取其中位数。
  • 源码与构建脚本：src/pages/friday-harbor/2026-04-29-when-the-model-draws-seattle.astro；数据文件：public/data/seattle-neighborhoods-real.geojson 与 seattle-neighborhoods-claude.geojson。

华盛顿大学。
